description: very good I'm using this software from last 1.5 yer
author: VIDYASAGARREDDY K.
pros: low-cost price and easy to build the application setup and Control reviewing and Process of SOX Review.
cons: Sometimes Controls trigger before the due date and missing notifications

description: LG Support team are game changers! They are the glue that holds the applications together and help you build an application that not only meets your organizations' needs, but also embraces automation.
author: Ashleigh G.
pros: The no-code ability to either build your own processes within the application or utilize some of the application templates available to you makes building your workflows super user-friendly!
cons: Not having a sandbox to test changes to workflows pre-production or a restore/undo button has been difficult for our teams to manage; making us hesitant to work on significant changes on our own.

review_title: Incredibly hard to use despite having good features
description: Governance is necessary, and LogicGate has the potential to make it easier but it's not there yet.
author: Catherine H.
pros: The features of the software are great and provide what we need. It provides governance structure and record-keeping.
cons: The features are incredibly unintuitive to access and use. It is hard to find tasks and commitments after they are created. It is like they got halfway through developing the website and stopped.

review_title: user of extensive structure and data content
description: Customer support services have been phenomenal during training and implementation. the tool performs well and contains the modifications and flexibility that our company administrators can address on their own.
author: michael R.
pros: The software tool is very flexible for creating data structures and workflows. Our assigned administrators are empowered to create or modify many aspects of the tool for our own purposes and needs. This includes adding users with specific roles and access levels, modify data structure, modify workflows, change screen layout formats, and add notification jobs. The tool reports can show visual and table outputs for data analysis of content in many ways and can be exported out as well.
cons: As LogicGate is relatively new company, this software tool has a few minor limitations for our specific needs. These limitations have been easily worked around with different options for solving, and LogicGate has already added many features that companies have requested. The company and software continues to grow and expand with periodic release updates and additional functionality.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: the overall experience has been great overall. like every software there are changes that would be great to have in the future
author: Ken M.
pros: the ease of setting up new workflows and fields
cons: the reporting could use capabilities update need to be allowed to be more than 5 workflows into reporting inability to create our own prefix on auto ID would like a clear data library

description: Great partnership and love the product.
author: Lori B.
pros: very customizable! the possibilities are endless! Logicgate is a great partner!
cons: The level of knowledge it takes to support and build the platform.

description: I am solving a variety of business problems with LogicGate (controls management, policy management, Third Party Risk, Business Continuity, GDPR, and others). Each of these applications are able to interact with each in a logical way. I have been able to build our security and privacy program exactly how I want to build it due to LG's flexibility.
author: Matt W.
pros: Personally, I love the customization ability within the LogicGate tool. I am able to build, grow, and edit the various different applications within the tool as I see fit. If the default, out of the box apps don't work for me, I can change them myself. I can also create my own reporting tools easily, and can show my leadership exactly what I want to show them.
cons: Compared to competitors, this tool my take some time to learn if you want to customize it; however, you ARE able to build the tool how you want to. You are not reliant on LogicGate and their staff to make changes that are important to you.

description: LogicGate has been a great experience so far. We continue to enhance the workflows to meet the needs of the team and company
author: Kevin C.
pros: LogicGate is very user friendly and it is very nice that updates auto save
cons: The fact that all builds are live and its easy to delete flows, applications, fields, etc. Would be nice to have a sandbox while building out

description: LogicGate has been a big improvement over our previous GRC tool. It is easy to learn and use. The support team is fantastic!
author: Tom S.
pros: Ease of use. It is so easy to build flows the way we want them. It is very easy to train new users, it is intuitive enough that some users started using it without training. It has allowed our team to engage the rest of the organization.
cons: I really like this tool. Although it may not currently have every feature, it is not overloaded with features we don't need or want.

description: so far, so good. We have just implemented.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Ease of implementation and product support
cons: reporting is not baked in, must integrate with reporting option.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Zeynep B.
pros: Easy to use and I can find what I'm looking for quickly.
cons: can provide more descriptive information about risk factors

description: Pretty exciting makes me see the low hanging fruits in our applications and processes
author: Lucas H.
pros: The flexibility to build just about any application
cons: As a new power user I'd say nothing realy, getting to know the tool and it's capabilities
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: The complexity of the system can grow with your business and your business' individual requirements. Our version of risk Cloud has developed over time along with the risk maturity of the business. The LogicGate team continue to push themselves to make improvements to Risk Cloud using suggestions from customers therefore there is always something new on the horizon which challenges you are a business user to improve your domain.
author: Deb M.
pros: As an organisation we did not have any risk management solution in place before working with Risk Cloud. The easy of the system for both admins and users has made the integration of the system into the business efficient and effective as we have used terms that the business are familiar with. The flexibility to make changes quickly when issues are identified gives users and management a lot of confidence in the system. The ability to make links between all the modules that you purchase has been fantastic as it demonstrates to all users that audits, control, risks, incidents and business continuity for example have impacts of each other. It is great that you can pick and choose which modules that you require but the downside is that each module comes with a hefty implementation fee if your Power Users/admin are not yet up to speed with all the build elements.
cons: The only thing which I believe is missing is a greater understanding of the Financial Conduct Authority which is only applicable to financial services in Great Britain. As an American company this is understandable, I'm just jealous when I see the support for new regulation in the US.

description: Have enjoyed the journey of enhancing compliance tracking.
author: Mark W.
pros: Very nice and user friendly solution for GRC and compliance tracking.
cons: They are a younger company so sometimes features do not exist, but they are growing quickly.

review_title: Logicgate is highly flexible and easy to learn
description: We are automating testing requests, product development, complaint resolution, and new supplier approvals. We are see better communication and visibility of the process. Also, Logicgate keeps the organization following the defined process and not deviating and ensures all the right people sign-off at the right step. Having a dashboard where each user sees the tasks they need to finish has increased productivity. Teaching new users is easy due to how good the user interface is.
author: Mark E.
pros: Logicgate makes it very easy to take a process and automate it without any programming code. You just drag and drop your steps and define a default and alternate paths such as needing to escalate an issue due to a field entry or calculation. It also can have multiple sub-processes within a process and can even define sub-processes of a sub-process which is something I have not found in any other software. Forms are easy to customize and change even while the process is live. There is no need to call a programmer or Logicgate to make changes. Their strength is their focus on enabling each company to make changes within the software without needing to pay a programming fee like most of their competitors. They have also recently improved the dashboard and reporting features.
cons: Because the software is fairly new, improvements are still being made. Sometimes it has not able to do exactly what is desired but each time they have listened to our problem and feedback. As a result most of the features we asked for have now been implemented in the latest releases.

description: Overall LogicGate is fantastic! Once you learn the system it is a one stop shop for creating risk assessments, tracking remediations, and mitigating our inherent risk.
author: Jennifer W.
pros: The ability to configure the system to match my organizations needs and the ability to maintain historical documents in one location.
cons: The technical abilities of my end state users have a large variance of capabilities. Those with a lower technical aptitude struggle with the user experience and we spend a lot of time developing training for them.

author: Jessica S.
pros: It is completely customizable and easy to use.
cons: Some features that I would like are not available, but I know the company is very serious about adding features that constomers request.

description: Useful software to keep tickets and the historical follow-up all in once place
author: Eric C.
pros: I found it to be pretty simple to use. I was able to keep track of all of the cases that were assigned to me and was reminded when ample follow-up was needed.
cons: I didn’t like that at times the program would duplicate tickets that were created but this was rectified pretty quickly with the customer support team. Also the software could have looked nicer but it was satisfactory in terms of design.

review_title: Risk management with a great user interface
author: Valerie M.
pros: The ability to configure real time without engaging developers
cons: A bit of a learning curve to become an effective Power User/Builder in the environement.

author: Daniel S.
pros: No Code workflow building makes this an easy tool to use and configure to your needs.
cons: I think that some of the calculation fields could be improved upon, as well as the reporting fields.

author: Margaret C.
pros: LogicGate allows us to centralize data in the various repositories. That data is then available to utilize.
cons: Leaning the behind the scenes was a little daunting as a new administrator. As with any new role I was able to figure it out.

description: Positive! Once everything is setup, maintaining your repositories is super easy. Whether you're doing document management and want to track revisions, risk assesments and want to do quarterly reviews of an asset at a glance, or procedures for admins to follow; this software does it!
author: Adam C.
pros: The people at LogicGate are some of the most responsive and able individuals you will ever work with. Whether email, chat, or phone call; you can always expect them to get back to you within a few minutes. The software itself truly helps create and maintain procedures, audits, and risk assessments. It is easy to use and straight forward to assign evidence requests to outside users, or even users who are not part of the GRC admins.
cons: The configuration is pretty difficult. The support more than makes up for this, and if a problem occurs they generally update the documentation.

author: Chelsea O.
pros: Code free nature, ease of automation, ease of use
cons: Nothing yet, still learning. WIP Inprogress
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: The team is wonderful and has patience working with us while learning the system.
author: Kristy T.
pros: Having a repository for all the documents and the ability to have the TPRM process automated.
cons: This is a very complex system on the backend and takes time to learn.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: The customer service team was great, they were always available for when I needed them. [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] were the best of the best. They helped me with all of the issues as well as were available whenever the engineers also needed them
author: Alexandra D.
pros: It's easy to use, it was easy to customize the process and form as well as make updates as needed.
cons: It would have been cool if we could personalize the categories to the sub-categories to the product.
